title: phyllanthus aoraiensis
intro: Phyllanthus aoraiensis, also known as the Aorai Tree or Island Spurge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Polynesian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus aoraiensis include its potential to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus aoraiensis, such as infusions and decoctions, are made by steeping the leaves or roots in water to create a medicinal tea that can be consumed to reap its benefits.
